idea-plugin.name: Toggle
idea-plugin.description:
Toggles the thing under the caret: booleans (true/false), single-character pairs (+/-, >/<), and string quote styles. Configurable globally and per language.

Action: Toggle the Thing Under Caret (id: dev.bartoszmaka.toggle.ToggleAction). Bind via Settings → Keymap, or map it in IdeaVim: 
nnoremap <leader>t :action dev.bartoszmaka.toggle.ToggleAction<CR>

action.description: Toggle boolean, operator, or quote under cursor
